nasb.text: Then set it empty on its coals So that it may be hot And its bronze may glow And its filthiness may be melted in it, Its rust consumed.

esv.text: Then set it empty upon the coals, that it may become hot, and its copper may burn, that its uncleanness may be melted in it, its corrosion consumed.

cnv.text: 然後把空鍋放在炭火上， 使鍋燒熱， 使銅燒紅， 使其中的污穢熔化， 使它的鏽得以除淨。

ccb.text: 然后，把倒空的锅放在炭火上烧热，把铜烧红，好熔化它的杂质，除净锈垢，
